content.speakerText: What’s up? Any new posts on your feed?
content.speakerTextCn: 最近怎么样？你的动态有发新东西吗？
expectedAnswers: Not much, just posting cute cat videos now.
I’ve been offline for a week — needed to unplug.
I started posting on Pinterest — it’s way more chill than Instagram.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了关于社交媒体动态的询问
语言准确性：是否正确使用现在完成时、口语缩写和自然表达
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、有个性，避免机械或生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了post, feed, offline, unplug, Instagram 等关键词

content.speakerText: You look like you just got back from somewhere cool — did you post it?
content.speakerTextCn: 你看起来刚从某个酷地方回来——你发了照片吗？
expectedAnswers: Yep! I posted a whole story — you missed it, I guess?
I did, but I’m not big on sharing vacations anymore.
I posted it on TikTok — Instagram’s too cluttered for me now.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方关于‘是否发照片’的观察和提问
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的时态和口语化表达（如‘I guess’, ‘too cluttered’）
表达自然度：是否表现出真实情感（如遗憾、冷漠、偏好转变）
关键词覆盖：���否使用了post, story, Instagram, TikTok, sharing 等场景词

content.scenarioHint: 朋友见面时，想自然地开启关于对方最近社交媒体活动的闲聊话题
content.speakerText: Hey, haven't seen any new posts from you lately—what’s up? Been on Instagram or switched to something else?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，最近都没看到你发新动态了，怎么了？还在用Instagram，还是换别的平台了？
expectedAnswers: I’ve been posting on TikTok more—it’s just more fun these days.
Actually, I took a break to focus on real life. No more scrollin’!
Yeah, I’ve been posting a bit! Check out my food pics last week.
I’m kinda ghosting social media for now—too much drama.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了对方最近的社交媒体活动
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、自然的表达方式（如缩写、俚语）
关键词覆盖：是否包含社交媒体相关词（如 Instagram, TikTok, posts, scroll）

content.scenarioHint: 久未联系的朋友重逢时，想轻松地提起对方最近在社交媒体上的动态
content.speakerText: Wow, it’s been ages! Did you finally start that travel blog you always talked about?
content.speakerTextCn: 哇，好久不见！你最后有没有开始你一直说要做的旅行博客？
expectedAnswers: I did! Just launched it last month—check out my Bali post!
Not yet, but I’ve been saving pics for it. Still figuring out the vibe.
Nah, I gave up—too much work. Now I just post stories on IG.
Kinda? I’m doing it but only for my close friends, not public.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确针对对方过去提过的社交媒体计划提问
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达（如 'gave up', 'figuring out the vibe'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含博客、帖子、Instagram、社交媒体相关词
